# Purpose
This code defines a simple function named [`test`](<#01-002test>) that always returns `true`. The function contains a block with a `return true;` statement, making the subsequent `return false;` statement unreachable. The code then uses an `assert` statement to verify that the [`test`](<#01-002test>) function returns `true`. This script provides narrow functionality, primarily serving as a basic test to confirm the behavior of the [`test`](<#01-002test>) function.
